planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Clarify the nature and stability of the dominant destination port distribution difference between DDoS and BENIGN classes to assess representation sensitivity and potential sampling bias.
key_checks: Compare destination port distribution across multiple time frames and data partitions
Measure entropy and dominant port ratio stability within each class over time
Assess whether the dominant port in DDoS is consistent or varies with attack instances
success_criteria: Identification of consistent port dominance patterns supporting targeted attack vector hypothesis
Detection of significant variation suggesting sampling or temporal bias
Quantification of distribution stability to bound representation sensitivity

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Characterize the extent, class stability, and structural impact of strong linear dependencies among packet length, flag count, and subflow features to understand redundancy and effective dimensionality.
key_checks: Quantify dependency strength and linear correlation patterns within and across classes
Evaluate stability of dependencies between DDoS and BENIGN classes
Estimate effective feature dimensionality reduction due to redundancy
success_criteria: Clear delineation of stable versus class-specific dependency patterns
Evidence bounding the degree of redundancy affecting feature space complexity
Insights into whether dependencies mask or inflate feature importance
router_constraints: preserve evidence references related to correlation and redundancy

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Determine whether near-constant bulk traffic feature values reflect genuine network saturation effects or artifacts of feature extraction under DDoS conditions.
key_checks: Analyze cardinality and value distribution of bulk features across classes and time
Investigate potential ceiling or saturation effects in bulk traffic measurements
Cross-check feature extraction methods for possible aggregation artifacts
success_criteria: Evidence supporting genuine network pattern versus extraction artifact
Bounded understanding of saturation effects on bulk feature diversity
Identification of stable versus unstable bulk feature behavior
router_constraints: preserve evidence references on feature cardinality and distribution
